summary: Iteration 25 - Bug Fix Verification: Missing Sample Papers table on Admin Extraction page. The bug has been FIXED. Backend API /api/admin/extraction-stats returns sample_papers array with 50 entries, and the frontend AdminExtraction.jsx renders the table correctly. All 13 backend tests passed. UI verified via Playwright automation.

backend: Response contains sample_papers array - THE KEY BUG FIX
Each sample paper has required fields: id, title, category, full_text_chars, sections_found, intro_chars, method_chars, results_chars, conclusion_chars
Sample paper field types are correct (string/int)
sections_found values are in valid range [0,4]
by_category structure has required keys per category
overall section rates present for all 4 sections
overall section has rate and avg_chars fields
frontend: Extraction tab navigates to correct page
Overview cards visible: Papers with PDF (429), All 4 Headers Found (79), Avg Extracted (10,868), Fallback Used (20)
Section Extraction Rates (Overall) renders with progress bars for Introduction, Methodology, Results, Conclusion
Extraction by Category table renders with all 6 categories
Sample Papers table columns: Title, Category, Sections (X/4), Intro, Method, Results, Concl, Full Text
First row displays actual paper data correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix confirmed: _compute_extraction_stats_impl() at line 1533 returns sample_papers[:50]
Frontend rendering confirmed: AdminExtraction.jsx lines 282-334 correctly conditionally render Sample Papers table when stats.sample_papers array exists and has entries
Cache warming handled gracefully with retry mechanism in frontend
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified the bug fix for the missing Sample Papers table on Admin Extraction page. The table now shows 50 sample papers with title, category, sections found (out of 4), character counts for each section (intro, method, results, conclusion), and full text size. All features on the Admin Extraction page are working correctly.

bug_verification.original_issue: Sample Papers table was missing from Admin Extraction page due to sample_papers being removed from API response during performance refactoring
